summary.geometry_note: Unit-panel single-cell: shared control donors + treated units; not aggregate 2-row TBR, not MCELL pooled, not supergeo/trim.
summary.readout_scale_caveat: Point/interval readout uses post-window outcome residual mean; true_effect records percent injection parameter — scales differ.
